title: melicope hiiakae
intro: Melicope hiiakae, also known as the Hawaiian yellow wood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Melicope hiiakae include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, salves, and infusions, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
